serviceNotes.engine oil: OM642 3.0L V6 diesel: flexible ASSYST up to 25,000 km / 12 months; rec 15,000 km severe use.
serviceNotes.dust filter: Dust filter per Mercedes EU booklet.
serviceNotes.fuel filter: Diesel fuel filter ~60,000 km on OM642—confirm ASSYST.

serviceSources.engine oil: Mercedes-Benz E-Class W211 owner's manual EU & ASSYST PLUS — maximum indicated Oil Service up to 25,000 km / 12 months for OM642 CDI (MB 229.51). Tier 2 https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7633-2006/service lists 10,000 km / 12 months — retained 25,000 km as manufacturer flexible-service maximum (EU).
serviceSources.dust filter: Mercedes-Benz E-Class (W211/S211) owner's manual EU — dust/pollen filter 30,000 km / 24 months
serviceSources.engine air filter: Mercedes-Benz E-Class W211 owner's manual EU — 60,000 km / 48 months inspection replacement; https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7633-2006/service lists 10,000 km (not adopted — inconsistent with MB inspection table)
serviceSources.brake fluid: Mercedes-Benz E-Class (W211) owner's manual EU — brake fluid renewal every 2 years (DOT 4+)
serviceSources.check brake pad thickness: Mercedes-Benz W211 EU maintenance booklet — inspect brake lining thickness at regular service intervals (~30,000 km orientation)
serviceSources.fuel filter: File: 60,000 km. https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7633-2006/service lists 30,000 km for E 320 CDI. Kept 60,000 km as Mercedes-Benz W211 OM642 EU workshop / ASSYST fuel filter interval commonly specified for CDI.
serviceSources.coolant: Mercedes-Benz E-Class W211 owner's manual EU — long-life coolant ~150,000 km orientation; https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7633-2006/service lists 90,000 km / 5 years — confirm printed coolant table for model year
serviceSources.automatic transmission fluid: 722.6 / 722.9 preventive ATF ~60,000 km — Mercedes-Benz workshop / specialist consensus
serviceSources.transfer case oil: 4MATIC transfer case oil preventive ~60,000 km — Mercedes-Benz W211 4MATIC workshop orientation
serviceSources.front axle differential oil: 4MATIC front axle differential preventive ~60,000 km — workshop orientation
serviceSources.rear axle differential oil: 4MATIC / RWD rear differential oil preventive ~60,000 km — specialist consensus
serviceSources.coolant flush: Supplementary coolant exchange ~120,000 km — specialist preventive
serviceSources.poly-V belt: https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7633-2006/service — serpentine belt 90,000 km (E 320 CDI); file REC 100,000 km preventive rounding
